The **2015 [Categoría Primera A](/wiki/Categor%C3%ADa_Primera_A "Categoría Primera A") season** (officially known as the **2015 Liga Águila season** for sponsorship reasons) was the 68th season of [Colombia](/wiki/Colombia "Colombia")'s top-flight football league. The season started on 30 January and concluded on 20 December.

20 teams competed against one another. [Santa Fe](/wiki/Independiente_Santa_Fe "Independiente Santa Fe") came in as the defending champions having won the title in the [2014 season's Finalización tournament](/wiki/2014_Categor%C3%ADa_Primera_A_season#Torneo_Finalización "2014 Categoría Primera A season"). [Jaguares de Córdoba](/wiki/Jaguares_de_C%C3%B3rdoba "Jaguares de Córdoba") entered as champion of the [2014 Primera B](/wiki/2014_Categor%C3%ADa_Primera_B_season "2014 Categoría Primera B season"), while [Cortuluá](/wiki/Cortulu%C3%A1 "Cortuluá") and [Cúcuta Deportivo](/wiki/C%C3%BAcuta_Deportivo "Cúcuta Deportivo") were promoted as the top teams of their respective groups in the [Promotion tournament](/wiki/2015_Categor%C3%ADa_Primera_B_season#Promotion_tournament "2015 Categoría Primera B season").

[Deportivo Cali](/wiki/Deportivo_Cali "Deportivo Cali") won its ninth title in the **Torneo Apertura** after beating [Independiente Medellín](/wiki/Independiente_Medell%C3%ADn "Independiente Medellín") in the finals, while in the **Torneo Finalización** [Atlético Nacional](/wiki/Atl%C3%A9tico_Nacional "Atlético Nacional") won its fifteenth title after beating [Junior](/wiki/Junior_F.C. "Junior F.C.") in the finals, thus surpassing [Millonarios](/wiki/Millonarios_FC "Millonarios FC") as the club with the most championships.

## Format

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2015_Categor%C3%ADa_Primera_A_season&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Format")]

Starting from this season, the league was expanded to 20 teams: 17 from last season plus [Jaguares](/wiki/Jaguares_de_C%C3%B3rdoba "Jaguares de Córdoba"), the [2014 Primera B](/wiki/2014_Categor%C3%ADa_Primera_B_season "2014 Categoría Primera B season") winners, and [Cortuluá](/wiki/Cortulu%C3%A1 "Cortuluá") and [Cúcuta Deportivo](/wiki/C%C3%BAcuta_Deportivo "Cúcuta Deportivo"), the top two teams of a [playoff tournament](/wiki/2015_Categor%C3%ADa_Primera_B_season#Promotion_tournament "2015 Categoría Primera B season") played in January 2015 between 8 Primera B sides to fill up the field of 20 teams. The Apertura and Finalización tournaments had a similar format and were divided into three stages: a First Stage which was contested on a single round-robin basis, with each team playing the other teams once and playing a regional rival once more for a total of 20 matches. The top eight teams after the twenty rounds advanced to a knockout round, where they were pitted into four ties to be played on a home-and-away basis, with the four winners advancing to the semifinals and the winner of each semifinal advancing to the final of the tournament, which were played on a home-and-away basis as well. The winner of the final was declared the tournament champion and will participate in the [2016 Copa Libertadores](/wiki/2016_Copa_Libertadores "2016 Copa Libertadores").[[1]](#cite_note-Format-1)

### First stage

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2015_Categor%C3%ADa_Primera_A_season&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: First stage")]
